questions.text: In NEO delivery management , orders can be split automatically into several Deliveries based on split rules
Which of the following is true for the Special Process Indicator (SpecProcId)?
options: It cannot be imported from MD or put in the SO by the user
You can track it though CCJ but not modify.
No changes should be made directly in SO before delivery creation

questions.text: Which of the following statements are true about Shipping conditions?
options: Don't have impact on the routes
Shipping conditions have no impact on the routes
Cannot be changed directly in SO or in mass through CCJ before delivery creation
Shipping condition determined in sales order is copied to delivery during creation

questions.text: "Proof of Delivery (POD) Relevant" is used for customers...
options: Where Payment term starts whenever the Order is received and delivered.
